series_metadata.series_title: Auctioneer Program Initial License Applications and Exams
series_metadata.series_description: License Applications (e.g. Auctioneer; Apprentice Auctioneer; Auction Firm; Auctioneer: Corporation, LLC, Partnership, & Association; and Special Auctioneer) received under Chapter 4707 may include, but are not limited to, police background check application form, bond or irrevocable letter of credit, school certification, Ohio Secretary of State registration and certification, and payment type. Exam records include exam rosters, exams, answer sheets, verbal score sheets, and answer keys.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: application is received. ; Paper: application is received
